source: Mordheim core rulebook, Part 3 - Campaigns & Optional Rules (Scenarios chapter, rulebook p.85-92), fetched from https://www.broheim.net/downloads/rules/Mordheim%20-%20Part%203%20-%20Campaigns%20%26%20Optional%20Rules.pdf on 2026-07-03. This only lists the Experience-award rules for each of the 9 core scenarios, not their full terrain/deployment/victory-condition text — the app only needs the XP bookkeeping. Border Town Burning's additional special scenarios are not included here (TODO if needed later).

universalAward.label: Survives
universalAward.note: Every scenario awards this to a Hero or Henchman group that survives the battle, even if injured — as long as they live to fight again.

awards.label: Winning Leader
awards.note: The leader of the winning warband.

awards.label: Per Enemy Out of Action
awards.note: Any Hero, for each enemy he puts out of action.

awards.note: The leader of the winning warband.

awards.note: Any Hero, for each enemy he puts out of action.

awards.label: Per Wyrdstone Counter
awards.note: If carrying a Wyrdstone counter at the end of the battle.

awards.label: Breaking Through
awards.note: Any warrior for breaking through enemy lines (whole group if a Henchman).

awards.note: Any Hero, for each enemy he puts out of action.

awards.label: Escaping
awards.note: The first Hero from either side (not both) who exits via the opposing table edge.

awards.label: Finding the Chest
awards.note: The Hero who finds the treasure chest.

awards.label: Winning Leader
awards.note: The leader of the warband controlling the most buildings at the end (no bonus if tied).
